overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an action-adventure game set in an ancient Mediterranean harbor at night. The player character walks from a stone dock through narrow building passages into a sprawling shipyard with wrecked vessels and construction activity, eventually reaching a beach area with moored ships.

events.description: character begins descending wide stone stairs toward harbor waterfront
moving from covered canopy to open waterfront with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs toward the harbor waterfront, approaching a large moored ship

notable_agents.action: hooded figure walking ahead toward the ship
person sitting on the dock edge near the water

entered.detail: large wooden sailing vessel with mast and furled sails moored at the dock
wide stone staircase leading down to water level
tall palm trees lining the distant harbor district
ancient stone building with columns across the harbor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a covered canopy overlooking an ancient harbor at night. The character descends stone stairs toward the waterfront, passing a large trireme ship moored at the dock. Palm trees and stone buildings line the harbor across the water, while a few NPCs populate the dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between ancient stone buildings

events.description: turning away from harbor into enclosed building complex
ascending steep stone stairs between close walls

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs through narrow building passages and under wooden scaffolding

notable_agents.action: seated figures resting on stone blocks near the wall

entered.detail: tall rectangular stone tower with small windows
rickety wooden structure with hanging cloth and beams

segments.scene_description: Leaving the waterfront, the character enters a narrow passage between ancient stone buildings. The environment becomes enclosed and darker as they ascend steep stairs, passing under wooden scaffolding and through a stone archway. The harbor and ship disappear from view as the character moves deeper into the building complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shipyard with wrecked vessels and construction activity

events.description: emerging from stone archway into expansive open shipyard
approaching large shipwreck with smoke rising from hull

agents.ego_description: walking through shipyard observing wrecked vessels, construction materials, and workers

notable_agents.action: worker walking through shipyard carrying materials
seated workers near fire pit warming themselves

entered.detail: large broken wooden ship hull with smoke rising from interior
tall wooden scaffolding structure for ship construction
burning fire pit providing warm light near the wreck
piles of construction timber and canvas tarps

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway, the scene opens into a sprawling shipyard illuminated by moonlight and campfires. A massive shipwreck dominates the left side with smoke rising from its hull, while wooden scaffolding towers stand on the right. Workers move through the area, and construction materials are scattered across the dirt ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer shipyard leading to beach with moored vessels

events.description: moving from construction area to beachfront with sand and moored ships

agents.ego_description: walking past wooden structures toward the beach where sailing ships are pulled ashore

notable_agents.action: worker walking ahead toward the beach area

entered.detail: sailing vessels with triangular sails pulled onto sandy shore
barrier made of stacked wooden logs
distant mountains visible beyond the harbor opening

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the outer shipyard toward the beach. The ground transitions to sand as the character passes wooden fences and scaffolding. In the distance, intact sailing ships with triangular sails are beached on the shore, with mountains visible beyond the harbor entrance. The shipwreck and construction area fall behind as the character approaches the open beach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered harbor dock through a claustrophobic urban passage and into a sprawling, moonlit shipyard. It begins under a covered canopy, descending stone stairs past a moored trireme toward a waterfront lined with palm trees and ancient buildings. As the character leaves the dock, the environment becomes enclosed and darker, shifting into a narrow passage of steep stairs and wooden scaffolding that leads through a stone archway. The scene then opens abruptly into a wide shipyard illuminated by campfires, where a massive, smoking shipwreck dominates the landscape amidst scattered construction materials and towering scaffolds. Finally, the ground transitions from dirt to sand as the camera moves past wooden fences toward an open beach, where intact sailing ships rest on the shore against a backdrop of distant mountains.
